text: Aaron, we still show 30 on the BambooHR roster but Jessica and Dimitri both left last week. Gusto only processed 28 in the last payroll run. I updated the schedule but HR system still has them as active.

Boss, October food costs are running high. I calculated 31% on the original location this month. We had to order extra lamb for the festival orders. Freshpoint raised produce prices 8% starting September.
